_description: Hardcoded response table for the Phase 2 chatbot icon. Not an LLM call — pure lookup by triggerKey. Exists so all 3 player videos show identical, predictable chatbot behavior with zero variance.

responses.displayText: Marami talaga 'no? Tingnan natin paano ito mabibilang nang mabilis.
responses.displayTextEn: That's a lot, right? Let's see how we can count it quickly.

responses.displayText: Pangkat ng sampu! Mas madaling bilangin kapag pinagsama-sama.
responses.displayTextEn: Groups of ten! Easier to count when they're grouped together.

responses.displayText: Ang mga natirang piraso ay tig-iisa lang — di na kasali sa pangkat.
responses.displayTextEn: The leftover pieces are just ones — they don't fit a full group.

responses.displayText: Tens at ones — 'yan lang ang dapat mong tandaan!
responses.displayTextEn: Tens and ones — that's all you need to remember!

responses.displayText: Handa ka na ba? Pindutin ang 'Let's go' kapag handa na.
responses.displayTextEn: Are you ready? Tap 'Let's go' when you're set.

responses.displayText: Subukan mong pindutin ang mga bagay sa screen para alamin pa!
responses.displayTextEn: Try tapping things on screen to learn more!
